segments.speaker: 题目19/20
segments.text: Listen to an announcement on a University radio station. Are you someone who loves writing research papers? Do you find yourself often reading something and thinking this could use some work? Become a peer writing mentor. An information session will be held next Tuesday at 7:00p.m.in the campus center. Year after year, graduating students say the writing mentor program was the biggest factor in their academic success. This is a great opportunity to meet new people, make a positive impact and gain valuable experience. See you on Tuesday.
